failedAssertions.reason: AgentDetail Runs transcript still does not consistently satisfy required color/style mapping for reasoning/tool/error lines.
Issue detail properties panel value controls still compute to 11px font size instead of required 10px.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Expanded dashboard agent cards did not render stream transcript rows (reasoning/tool calls/tool results/errors), so contract color-coding checks were not testable in this run.

appliedUpdates.description: Added rerun guidance to recover from intermittent local dev-server dropouts by restarting `PORT=3100 pnpm dev:once` and re-checking `/api/health` before spawning follow-up flow batches.
